title: Scene I — The Eyewitness Report

segments.cue: Church ambient opens — 5 seconds of organ drone, stone room. Fade to near-silence but not complete silence — a thin drone underneath remains throughout.
segments.director_note: PRELUDE. Sets the acoustic. No voice yet.

segments.ssml: <speak><prosody rate="slow">USA's overseas-based beings were seen praying <break time="600ms"/> in a protesting church, <break time="600ms"/> bending heads upwards, <break time="600ms"/> gazing towards a church leader <break time="600ms"/> standing on a pedestal, <break time="600ms"/> all surrounded by Hollywoodian posters <break time="600ms"/> about the 2025 celestial games, <break time="600ms"/> soon to be held in various aerial fields <break time="600ms"/> atop their homeland territory.</prosody></speak>
segments.director_note: Bureaucratic precision. Each clause is a filed observation — the emotion lives in the words themselves, never performed.
The eyewitness closes the file. Hold the silence — do not shorten.

overall_notes: Scene I establishes the EYEWITNESS as the detached narrator of record. Slow, clipped, bureaucratic. The thin drone underneath remains audible beneath the prelude silence and should not be filled.
